description: CompositionWhite printed top made of 100% viscose, has a round neck defined by a ruffled layer of broad piping, and half sleeves FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)Do not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printEthnic fused with oodles of attitude results in this stylish top from jealous 21. The kaftan cut camouflages that unwanted fat and reflects a slim and toned look. Pair this top with slim Fit denims and heels for a complete fashionable look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
